scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute nuxt-content --local --file=server/db/migrations/004_portfolio_descricao.sql && wrangler d1 execute nuxt-content --local --file=scripts/backfill-portfolio-descricao.sql
scripts.migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute nuxt-content --remote --file=server/db/migrations/001_photo_system.sql && wrangler d1 execute nuxt-content --remote --file=server/db/migrations/002_content_system.sql && wrangler d1 execute nuxt-content --remote --file=server/db/migrations/003_content_seeds.sql && wrangler d1 execute nuxt-content --remote --file=server/db/migrations/004_portfolio_descricao.sql && wrangler d1 execute nuxt-content --remote --file=scripts/backfill-portfolio-descricao.sql
scripts.r2:cors: wrangler r2 bucket cors set fotografa-lillia-ensaios --file r2-cors.json
